scoring_top_pages.title: Leadership Message - Environmental and Social Impact | Oracle
Sustainability—Corporate Social Responsibility Report | Oracle India

purpose_examples: As the pace of change accelerates, our mission remains steadfast: to leverage our innovation, technology, and people to help create a better future for our communities and our planet.

Today, we are accelerating business transformation through the power of AI, and we have integrated AI throughout every layer of our technology stack to unlock new possibilities for our customers, partners, and society at large.
We’re proud to support initiatives in education, health, community, and environmental sustainability, knowing that meaningful progress depends on collective action and sustained commitment.
We also operate two charitable foundations dedicated to young people.
Supported by hundreds of Oracle Volunteers, it delivered 13,879 hours of learning for Design Tech High School and other partners in FY25.

purpose_presence.question: Does the company articulate why it exists, who it serves, and the impact it seeks to create?
purpose_presence.score_description: A recognizable purpose statement exists, but stakeholders or intended impact are only partly specified.
